essence: Creates visual artwork for books, games, branding, advertising, and digital media.

identity.title: Illustrator
identity.summary: Produces original artwork, characters, and visual concepts using traditional or digital tools for a wide range of creative projects.

salary.notes: Freelance illustrators’ earnings vary widely depending on commissions and licensing.

qualifications: Portfolio demonstrating artistic skill and style
Understanding of composition and visual storytelling
Ability to work to briefs and deadlines

lifestyle.description: Freelance or studio‑based work with creative autonomy, deadlines, and varied client projects.

habits: Produces final artwork digitally or traditionally
Collaborates with clients and art directors
Maintains a portfolio and personal projects
